spec.description: AI inference server metrics: token generation speed, GPU utilization, memory, and temperature from llama-server and llama-swap

elements.title: Token Speed (tokens/sec)
elements.description: Tokens generated per second (speed of inference)

elements.title: Active Requests
elements.description: Number of requests currently being processed

elements.title: Deferred Requests
elements.description: Number of deferred requests (waiting for capacity)

elements.title: Busy Decode Slots
elements.description: Number of busy decode slots (0 = no active generation)

elements.title: Max Context Size
elements.description: Maximum context window size for the loaded model

elements.title: CPU Utilization %
elements.description: CPU utilization from llama-swap (avg across cores)

elements.title: GPU Utilization % Over Time
elements.description: GPU utilization from llama-swap over time

elements.title: GPU Temp (C) Over Time
elements.description: GPU temperature from llama-swap over time

elements.title: VRAM Utilization % Over Time
elements.description: VRAM utilization from llama-swap over time

elements.title: VRAM Used (GB) Over Time
elements.description: VRAM used in GB over time

elements.title: GPU Power (W) Over Time
elements.description: GPU power draw in watts over time

elements.title: CPU Utilization % Over Time
elements.description: CPU utilization from llama-swap over time

elements.title: Host Memory Used (GB) Over Time
elements.description: Host memory used in GB over time

elements.title: GPU Util % (nvidia_smi) Over Time
elements.description: GPU utilization from nvidia_gpu_exporter over time

elements.title: GPU Temp C (nvidia_smi) Over Time
elements.description: GPU temperature from nvidia_gpu_exporter over time

spec.title: AI Inference Metrics
